title: Stock Market Plunge: Why I'm Investing in REITs
text: I hate volatility, which is why I generally favor boring investments with big dividend yields. That's exactly why I own REITs.

title: Federal Realty Is Yielding 4.42%, The Only REIT Dividend King Is Getting Closer To Buy Territory
text: Federal Realty is the only REIT that has been crowned a Dividend King, with more than 50 consecutive years of annual dividend increases. FRT is an integrated REIT spanning several sectors of real estate, creating diversified income that has navigated every major crisis in the past 50 years.

title: Federal Realty Investment Trust: There Are Better Options Than This Dividend King
text: Federal Realty Trust is one of a few companies that have earned the title of Dividend King, with 54 years of annual dividend raises. Shares now trade at a better valuation after a 30% selloff YTD with a price/FFO of 16.7x.

title: The 7 Highest-Yielding Dividend Kings to Buy Now and Hold Forever

title: Federal Realty Investment Trust Announces Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call Information
text: N. BETHESDA, Md. , July 6, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Federal Realty Investment Trust (NYSE: FRT) will announce second quarter 2022 earnings in a press release to be issued before market open on Thursday, August 4, 2022.
